title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 68.
content:
There was an Old Man on some rocks,
    Who shut his wife up in a box;
    When she said, "Let me out,"
    He exclaimed, "Without doubt,
    You will pass all your life in that box."
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 68." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
